hero.role: Landing Page · Institutional Sites · E-commerce · Systems & APPs
hero.description: I build high-performance interfaces with Next.js, Angular and Node.js. From design to deploy, I turn ideas into digital products that deliver results.

about.label: 01 / About me
about.p1: I'm a Fullstack Developer focused on Frontend, passionate about building interfaces that combine performance, aesthetics and usability.
about.p2: I have solid experience with Next.js, Angular, Node.js and PHP, working on frontend-backend integration, API consumption, dynamic and responsive interfaces, and complex validations.
about.p3: I work with Styled Components, Material UI, Chakra UI and master animation tools like GSAP + ScrollTrigger and advanced SVG manipulation. Jest tests are part of my workflow.
about.p4: I work in agile environments with continuous delivery and constant communication. I also work on freelance website and landing page projects.
about.card1_desc: Componentization, scalability and best practices in every project.
about.card2_desc: Focus on UX, performance and deliveries that generate real value.
about.card3_desc: Agile operation, constant communication and frequent deploys.

projects.label: 02 / Projects
projects.title: What I build
projects.description: Some of the projects that demonstrate my experience with modern interfaces, complex integrations and performance.
projects.p1_desc: Complete document validation system with CPF/CNPJ, dynamic forms and government API integration. Responsive interface with real-time feedback.
projects.p1_result: Reduced manual document validation time by 70% for the client.
projects.p2_desc: Interactive dashboard with animated SVG charts, real-time data visualization and exportable reports. Animations with GSAP + ScrollTrigger.
projects.p2_result: Increased user engagement with platform reports by 45%.
projects.p3_desc: High-conversion landing page for a tech startup. Smooth animations, optimized performance and mobile-first design with 98 Lighthouse Score.
projects.p3_result: 12% conversion rate, surpassing market average by 3x.

services.label: 02 / Services
services.title: What I can do for you
services.s1_desc: Websites, systems and landing pages with Next.js, React and Angular.
services.s2_desc: Scalable micro frontend architecture with Module Federation and React.
services.s3_desc: Development and integration of RESTful APIs with Node.js and PHP.
services.s4_desc: Speed optimization, technical SEO and Core Web Vitals.
services.s5_desc: Micro-interactions and advanced animations with GSAP and Framer Motion.
services.s6_desc: Code review, project architecture and best practices.
